examples: During the flush times, salespeople were surly, waiters snobby.
In reflection, my firm belief in the power of the brand was naive, not to mention a bit snobby.
It is (really) of no use to argue with such a snobby person.
But the last remaining vestige of the sport's snobby, country club roots is proving tough to kill off.
This was the England of which there will always be one: class obsessed, snobby but, in its way, endearing.
